title: lapsana glandulifera
intro: Lapsana glandulifera, also known as Nettle-leaved Sage or Indian Nettle, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lapsana glandulifera include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Lapsana glandulifera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
